mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_style_preference_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND image_id = #{imageId}
SELECT * FROM user_style_preference_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_style_preference_log WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_style_preference_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND preference_type = #{preferenceType}
